title: International Funds Transfer
opening: Good morning! How may I assist you today?

t1.prompt: Good morning! How may I assist you today?
t1.promptTranslation: Good morning! How may I assist you today?

t-other-service.prompt: For account openings, ATM issues, or PIN resets, please consult our specialists at the information desk. Is there anything else I can assist you with directly?
t-other-service.promptTranslation: For account openings, ATM issues, or PIN resets, please consult our specialists at the information desk. Is there anything else I can assist you with directly?

t2.prompt: Right then, an international transfer. Could you specify the destination country and whether it's a singular transaction or a recurring remittance? Also, are you keen on details regarding fees, exchange rates, or the transfer duration?
t2.promptTranslation: Right then, an international transfer. Could you specify the destination country and whether it's a singular transaction or a recurring remittance? Also, are you keen on details regarding fees, exchange rates, or the transfer duration?

t3.prompt: Understood. Our international transfers typically involve a nominal flat processing fee, dynamically updated exchange rates, and a clearance time of one to five business days. Do you have the beneficiary's complete banking details, such as their IBAN and SWIFT/BIC code, and would you like a detailed, no-obligation quote outlining the current mid-market rate and our operational margin?
t3.promptTranslation: Understood. Our international transfers typically involve a nominal flat processing fee, dynamically updated exchange rates, and a clearance time of one to five business days. Do you have the beneficiary's complete banking details, such as their IBAN and SWIFT/BIC code, and would you like a detailed, no-obligation quote outlining the current mid-market rate and our operational margin?

t4.prompt: Excellent. If you're content with the terms and ready to proceed, I can initiate the transfer process forthwith. Please have your identification and the requisite funds available. We'll finalize the particulars momentarily.
t4.promptTranslation: Excellent. If you're content with the terms and ready to proceed, I can initiate the transfer process forthwith. Please have your identification and the requisite funds available. We'll finalize the particulars momentarily.

t-repeat.prompt: I apologize, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase your request or articulate it a little more clearly?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I apologize, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase your request or articulate it a little more clearly?

t-end.prompt: Perfect. We'll ensure that's handled efficiently for you. Thank you for choosing to bank with us today, and do have a most pleasant day!
t-end.promptTranslation: Perfect. We'll ensure that's handled efficiently for you. Thank you for choosing to bank with us today, and do have a most pleasant day!
